import re
from pathlib import Path

text = Path('backend/hono.ts').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
# Match app.<method>(route, ...)
pattern = re.compile(r"app\.(get|post|put|delete|options|patch)\s*\(\s*['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"]", re.MULTILINE)

routes = {}
for m in pattern.finditer(text):
    method = m.group(1).upper()
    route = m.group(2)
    key = f"{method} {route}"
    routes[key] = True

sorted_routes = sorted(routes.keys(), key=lambda x: (x.split()[1], x.split()[0]))
print(f'TOTAL ROUTES: {len(sorted_routes)}')
for r in sorted_routes:
    print(r)
PY

import re
from pathlib import Path

text = Path('backend/hono.ts').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
# Match app.<method>(route, ...)
pattern = re.compile(r"app\.(get|post|put|delete|options|patch)\s*\(\s*['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"]", re.MULTILINE)

routes = {}
for m in pattern.finditer(text):
    method = m.group(1).upper()
    route = m.group(2)
    key = f"{method} {route}"
    routes[key] = True

sorted_routes = sorted(routes.keys(), key=lambda x: (x.split()[1], x.split()[0]))
print(f'TOTAL ROUTES: {len(sorted_routes)}')
for r in sorted_routes:
    print(r)
